meta.notes: Recurring shared chores for the token owner's household. On each tick the endpoint fires a lead-time reminder to a chore's owner before its due time, and — if the due time passes with the chore still undone — a still-not-done nudge to the owner plus a gentle heads-up to the OTHER parent so a slip isn't a morning surprise. Each stage dedups to once per local day, so a frequent poll (every 15 min) fires each exactly once; it's silent when nothing's due. A one-tap 'Done' button (or POST /household/chores/{id}/done) clears a chore for the day. Use a household member's per-user token so delivery resolves that household.
